mapper.insert: insert into members(m_idx, m_id, m_pw, m_name, m_addr, m_email, m_phone) values(seq_members.nextval, #{m_id}, #{m_pw}, #{m_name}, #{m_addr}, #{m_email}, #{m_phone})
mapper.update: update members set m_name = #{m_name}, m_email = #{m_email}, m_phone = #{m_phone}, m_addr = #{m_addr}, m_addr2 = #{m_addr2} where m_id = #{m_id} and m_active = 0
mapper.select: select * from members where m_active = 0 and m_id=#{m_id}
mapper.insert: insert into refresh_tokens (rt_idx, rt_user_id, rt_token) values(seq_refresh_tokens.nextval, #{rt_user_id}, #{rt_token})
